name: Fire Formation - Tensen
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>炎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>えん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>舞</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぶ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－「<ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>テン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>璇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>セン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>」
desc: When this card is activated: Target 1 Beast-Warrior-Type monster you control; it gains 700 ATK until the end of this turn. (This ATK gain remains even if this card leaves the field.) All Beast-Warrior-Type monsters you control gain 300 ATK.
